args.Description: "Add autoComplete='off' and new-password hints to prevent browser autofill from pre-populating tracker config fields with saved passwords\""

"Unify ConfigDialog avatar color to use login form palette (#667eea) instead of per-provider color\""
args.ReplacementContent: "        <Avatar sx={{ width: 28, height: 28, backgroundColor: alpha('#667eea', 0.1), color: '#667eea' }}>{provider.icon}</Avatar>"
args.TargetContent: "        <Avatar sx={{ width: 28, height: 28, backgroundColor: alpha(provider.color, 0.1), color: provider.color }}>{provider.icon}</Avatar>"

args.Description: "Unify ProviderCard avatar and hover colors to use #667eea instead of per-provider colors\""
args.ReplacementContent:
"        '&:hover': { borderColor: alpha('#667eea', 0.5), transform: 'translateY(-1px)', boxShadow: `0 4px 16px ${alpha('#667eea', 0.1)}` },
      }}>
      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1.5 }}>
        <Avatar sx={{ width: 36, height: 36, backgroundColor: alpha('#667eea', isDark ? 0.2 : 0.08), color: '#667eea', '& .MuiSvgIcon-root': { fontSize: 20 } }}>"
args.TargetContent:

      }}>

        <Avatar sx={{ width: 36, height: 36, backgroundColor: alpha(prov.color, isDark ? 0.2 : 0.08), color: prov.color, '& .MuiSvgIcon-root': { fontSize: 20 } }}>"

args.Description: "Remove now-unused MUI icon imports that were replaced by ServiceIcons SVGs\""
args.ReplacementContent:
"import {
  Settings as SettingsIcon, Add as AddIcon,
  Delete as DeleteIcon, Save as SaveIcon, VpnKey as KeyIcon,
  Tune as TuneIcon, Code as CodeIcon, CheckCircle as CheckIcon,
  Cancel as CancelIcon, UploadFile as UploadIcon, GitHub as GitHubIcon,
  Security as SecurityIcon,
  PlayArrow as TestConnectionIcon, ArrowBack as ArrowBackIcon,
  Close as CloseIcon,
  Email as EmailIcon, Webhook as WebhookIcon, Edit as EditIcon,
  Visibility as VisibilityIcon, VisibilityOff as VisibilityOffIcon,
  ExpandMore as ExpandMoreIcon,
} from '@mui/icons-material';"
args.TargetContent:
"import {
  Settings as SettingsIcon, Add as AddIcon,
  Delete as DeleteIcon, Save as SaveIcon, VpnKey as KeyIcon,
  Tune as TuneIcon, Code as CodeIcon, CheckCircle as CheckIcon,
  Cancel as CancelIcon, UploadFile as UploadIcon, GitHub as GitHubIcon,
  Security as SecurityIcon, BugReport as BugIcon,
  PlayArrow as TestConnectionIcon, ArrowBack as ArrowBackIcon,
  Close as CloseIcon, Storage as StorageIcon, Cloud as CloudIcon,
  Notifications as NotificationsIcon, Email as EmailIcon,
  Webhook as WebhookIcon, Chat as ChatIcon, Edit as EditIcon,
  Visibility as VisibilityIcon, VisibilityOff as VisibilityOffIcon,
  ExpandMore as ExpandMoreIcon,
  Bolt as BoltIcon,
  TaskAlt as TaskAltIcon,
  Article as ArticleIcon,
  AutoStories as AutoStoriesIcon,
  DeviceHub as DeviceHubIcon,
  BuildCircle as BuildCircleIcon,
  Terminal as TerminalIcon,
  ViewKanban as ViewKanbanIcon,
} from '@mui/icons-material';"
